subcodes.first_line: Thou hast written regarding the spreading of the wings of the birds of night. As the Most Exalted Pen hath foretold in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از انتشار اجنحه طیور لیل مرقوم نموده بودید هذا ما اخبر به القلم الاعلی فی
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
